message:
test(gateway): add URL security utility test suite

Adds comprehensive tests for url-security.ts functions:

isPrivateNetworkUrl tests:
- Localhost variants (localhost, 127.0.0.1, ::1)
- Private IPv4 ranges (10.x, 172.16-31.x, 192.168.x)
- Link-local and metadata endpoints
- Valid public URLs pass through

escapeSlackMrkdwn tests:
- Escapes &, <, > characters
- Preserves safe characters

escapeSlackUrl tests:
- Escapes pipe character for Slack link format

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
